extraction.title: Population pharmacokinetics of Testdrug

structural_model.description: two-compartment oral model with first-order absorption

evidence_quotes: A nonlinear mixed-effects model was fitted with NONMEM FOCEI.
A two-compartment oral model with first-order absorption was selected.

field_evidence.value: two-compartment oral model with first-order absorption
field_evidence.evidence: "A two-compartment oral model with first-order absorption was selected."

limitations: No information on the number of subjects or data points.
